series_metadata.series_description: Terms of Agreements, leases, and maintenance on various types of equipment owned by the board.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain until scanned or for period of time specified in lease - maintain until next agreement has been issued, then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain for period of time specified in lease or until next agreement has been issued, and auditor has released final audit report., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
